generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors before attempting semantic fixes.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or type mismatches.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure correct scalar type declarations (int, real, bool) in AGREE.
Helper declarations should match the expected type of the expression.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid modifying architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on contract corrections.
